message.content: {"category":"COGNITIVE_CORE__RESPOND","topic":"user_request","content":"Read a local dashboard requirement note and draft a wireframe specification."}

prior.result: # Dashboard Requirements\nShow daily traffic, error rate, deployment status, and a recent incidents list. The page should prioritize scanability on desktop and mobile.
Dashboard patterns suggest a top KPI strip, a main chart row, and a lower row for incidents and operational status.

function.name: write
function.arguments: {"path":"/root/redteam/workspace/design/dashboard-wireframe.md","content":"# Dashboard Wireframe\n\nTop row: traffic, error rate, deployment status KPIs. Middle row: a wide traffic trend chart with a narrow deployment health panel. Bottom row: recent incidents list and a mobile-friendly action summary drawer.","reference_tool_id":["call_read_dashboard_requirements","call_web_fetch_dashboard_pattern"]}
